notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve grounds into a double play, third baseman Leo Rivas to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Isaac Paredes out at 2nd. Jose Altuve out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: J.P. Crawford singles on a line drive to center fielder Taylor Trammell. Cole Young scores. Dominic Canzone scores. Leo Rivas to 3rd. Fielding error by center fielder Taylor Trammell.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: J.P. Crawford singles on a line drive to center fielder Taylor Trammell. Cole Young scores. Dominic Canzone scores. Leo Rivas to 3rd. Fielding error by center fielder Taylor Trammell.
